title: Agent Framework Proof
text: Public proof repo showing a LangGraph board runner, a policy safety eval harness, regression tests, and GitHub Actions CI for recruiter-facing agent workflow artifacts.

title: AML Detection Engine
text: Public AML and RegTech proof focused on blockchain transaction risk signals, triage, rule-based detection, and recruiter-safe finance plus compliance storytelling.

title: Bionic Banker
text: Public writing and project surface for AI, finance, agent systems, and technical case studies. Useful for portfolio proof and recruiter context.

title: Hermes Kite
text: Public testnet and hackathon-oriented proof around agent infrastructure. Use as testnet infrastructure proof, not live trading proof.
